metadata.description: All-in-one workflow plugin for Claude Code. 33 skills and 31 specialized agents for spec-driven development, TDD, design quality, web research, startup validation, and autonomous execution in a single install.

plugins.name: fh
plugins.description: fhhs-skills: 33 skills and 31 agents — plan, spec, build, review, fix, research, design, and ship autonomously. Includes /fh:plan-work, /fh:build, /fh:fix, /fh:review, /fh:research, /fh:auto, and more.
